name: moon-moth
description: Moon-aware agentic dev loop for TypeScript monorepos — scopes work to affected projects via `moon query`, implements TDD-first, verifies via affected :typecheck/:lint/:test before handoff. Cross-runtime (Claude Code + Codex).

interface.shortDescription: Moon-aware dev loop: scope to affected projects, implement TDD-first, verify before handoff
interface.longDescription: Moon Moth makes an agent fast and precise in a moon TypeScript monorepo. It scopes every task to the affected project graph via `moon query`, implements TDD-first against only the touched packages, and verifies through affected `:typecheck`/`:lint`/`:test` runs before handing off. It never blindly scans the whole repo — it follows the diff.
defaultPrompt: Use Moon Moth to scope this task to the affected moon projects before doing anything.
Use Moon Moth to verify my changes by running affected typecheck, lint, and test.
